title: FORMACIÓN PARA LOS GANADEROS SOBRE CÓMO PREPARAR EL ESPACIO DE TRABAJO PARA EL VETERINARIO EN LA GRANJA
description: A training guide for poultry farmers on preparing a dedicated on-farm workspace for veterinarians to ensure safe and efficient clinical examinations and necropsies. It aims to strengthen biosecurity measures and prevent cross-contamination during veterinary visits.
